oryxel_chat_network_info: You are interacting with a neural network assistant.
oryxel_chat_key_required_title: Add an API key to start chat
oryxel_chat_key_required_desc: Connect at least one AI provider in Settings to use the assistant.
oryxel_chat_placeholder: Describe a mood, note, or ask for analogs…
oryxel_chip_summer: Find me a fresh summer citrus
oryxel_chip_evening: Recommend a warm amber for evenings
oryxel_keys_tooltip: Your API keys are encrypted and stored securely on the backend. Raw keys are never shown after save.
oryxel_keys_local: Keys are encrypted at rest and linked to your account.
oryxel_settings_provider_guide: How to get this API key
oryxel_modal_add_desc: Search the catalog — pyramid fills in automatically.
oryxel_profile_teaser: Open the full profile for radar chart and recommendations.
oryxel_chat_greeting: Tell me a reference fragrance or a mood. I can suggest analogs and add them to "To try".
oryxel_public_hero_title: Your personal fragrance diary with AI intelligence
oryxel_public_hero_desc: Build your fragrance collection, chat with your AI assistant, and receive tailored recommendations. Free, open source, forever.
oryxel_public_step1_desc: Keep a structured diary: to-try, liked, disliked, and owned lists with ratings, notes, and status labels.
oryxel_public_step2_desc: Your assistant analyzes your profile, refines your preferences, and builds an olfactory radar based on your conversations.
oryxel_public_step3_desc: AI suggests fragrances, analogs, and discoveries — precisely matched to your profile — with one-tap add to lists.
oryxel_public_feat_chat_desc: Smart chat powered by OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini — bring your own API key.
oryxel_public_feat_tables_desc: Structured lists with notes, ratings, statuses, and filtering across your whole collection.
oryxel_public_feat_themes_desc: Light Aura, Midnight Scent, Botanical, Rose Blush, and Lavender Mist.
oryxel_public_feat_privacy_desc: API keys are encrypted at rest. Your data stays yours — no third-party analytics.
oryxel_public_feat_export_desc: Download your entire collection as JSON or Markdown in one click.
oryxel_public_feat_multi_ai_desc: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Qwen, Perplexity — choose any or switch freely.
oryxel_public_audience_item1_desc: Organize hundreds of fragrances with notes, ratings, and a full history.
oryxel_public_audience_item2_desc: Discover the world of perfumery with AI guidance and an intuitive diary.
oryxel_public_audience_item3_desc: Save wish lists and get AI recommendations tailored for your loved ones.
oryxel_public_audience_item4_desc: Deep profile analysis, olfactory radar, and analogs for niche fragrances.
oryxel_public_feature_diary_desc: Maintain your to-try, liked, disliked, and owned lists with ratings and status labels in one place.
oryxel_public_feature_ai_desc: Profile traits like archetype, favorite note, and radar can be inferred from your clarifications.
oryxel_public_feature_confirm_desc: Minor updates can auto-apply while critical profile changes are queued for your explicit confirmation.
oryxel_public_free_desc: Oryxel is an open-source project. You only pay your AI provider directly for token usage — no subscriptions, no hidden fees.
oryxel_public_faq_a1: Oryxel is an open-source community project. We charge nothing — you only pay your AI provider for the tokens you use.
oryxel_public_faq_q2: What do I actually pay for?
oryxel_public_faq_a2: Only API tokens when using AI features (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.). The service itself is free with no usage limits.
oryxel_public_faq_a3: Your data lives on a secure backend in encrypted form. API keys are never shown in full after saving.
oryxel_public_faq_a4: Yes. Encryption at rest, one-click full data deletion, and open source code you can audit yourself.
oryxel_public_faq_a5: Yes, anytime. You can add keys for multiple providers in Settings and choose which one to use as default.
oryxel_public_faq_a6: Oryxel is a fully responsive web app that works great on phones and tablets directly in the browser.
oryxel_public_privacy_desc: Your data belongs to you alone. API keys are encrypted at rest, no third-party analytics, and you can delete everything with one click.
oryxel_login_desc_signin: Authorization is required before accessing diary and profile.
oryxel_login_desc_signup: Create an account with your preferred provider to access your diary.
oryxel_login_switch_signin: Already have an account? Sign in
oryxel_login_oauth_missing: OAuth providers are not configured yet. Set credentials in environment variables.
oryxel_login_error_start: Could not start social login. Check provider credentials and try again.
oryxel_chat_critical_pending: I prepared a critical update: {summary}. Please confirm it in the pending updates card.
oryxel_chat_error_generic: I could not process this update right now. Please try again.
oryxel_delete_confirm: Delete all account data permanently? This action cannot be undone.
oryxel_provider_guide_step_1: Sign in to {provider} and open API key settings.
oryxel_provider_guide_step_2: Create a new key for Oryxel in {provider}.
oryxel_provider_guide_step_3: Copy the key and keep it in a secure place.
oryxel_provider_guide_step_4: Paste the key into Oryxel and save it.
oryxel_provider_guide_note_1: Keys are encrypted at rest and never shown in full after saving.
oryxel_provider_guide_note_2: Rotate keys regularly and revoke old keys in the provider console.
oryxel_profile_sync_confirm_desc: A profile sync is already in progress. Start a new one? The current task will be cancelled.
oryxel_notes_empty: Sync your profile to generate note preferences
oryxel_guide_extrait_desc: The most concentrated form. Lasts 8–12+ hours with minimal sillage — a skin-close, intimate presence.
oryxel_guide_edp_desc: Rich and long-lasting. Lasts 6–8 hours with noticeable sillage. The most popular choice for evening and everyday wear.
oryxel_guide_edt_desc: Lighter and fresher. Lasts 4–6 hours. Perfect for daytime and office settings.
oryxel_guide_edc_desc: Very light. Lasts 2–3 hours. Classic splash-on format for a refreshing burst.
oryxel_guide_fraiche_desc: The lightest category. Lasts 1–2 hours. Often water-based, perfect for warm weather.
oryxel_guide_tip_pulse_desc: Wrists, neck, behind the ears — body warmth activates and projects the scent.
oryxel_guide_tip_less_desc: 1–2 sprays is usually plenty. Reapply if needed — overapplication can't be undone.
oryxel_guide_tip_drydown_desc: Give it 15–30 minutes. The dry-down reveals the true character of the fragrance.
oryxel_guide_tip_layer_desc: Unscented lotion on pulse points before spraying gives the scent something to hold on to.
oryxel_guide_family_citrus_desc: Fresh, zesty, uplifting. Bergamot, lemon, orange peel.
oryxel_guide_family_floral_desc: Romantic and soft. Rose, jasmine, lily of the valley.
oryxel_guide_family_woody_desc: Warm and grounding. Sandalwood, cedar, vetiver.
oryxel_guide_family_oriental_desc: Rich and sensual. Amber, oud, musk, warm spices.
oryxel_guide_family_fresh_desc: Clean and airy. Marine notes, green accord, ozone.
oryxel_guide_family_gourmand_desc: Sweet and edible. Vanilla, caramel, praline.
oryxel_note_graph_empty: Add fragrances to see the note graph
oryxel_note_graph_legend_lines: Lines = notes co-occur in a fragrance
